intro: Once you start, you can’t stop! The irresistibly cute cat-jumping game is here. Jump higher with over 25 cats and build your own adorable collection!
description:
Dive into a world of arcade-style jumping action brought to life with the sweetest, most lovable cat illustrations you can imagine. From the nimble Abyssinian and fluffy Persian to the cheeky Munchkin and classy Tuxedo, more than 25 unique cat characters, each with their own special abilities and personality, are waiting for you in obstacle-packed stages. Endless stages that climb higher with every jump, heart-pounding moments created by tricky obstacles and powerful items, and an intuitive UI with controls designed just for this game deliver a fresh challenge every single time you play. With over 20 costumes to dress up your favorite cats, this is more than a simple arcade game; it is a full-on collectible adventure.

・Over 25 unique playable cats, each with a special ability
・Over 20 costumes to create your perfect cat
・Endless vertical stages that rise higher the more you jump
・Upgrade your cats and use items to supercharge your jumping power
・Casual arcade fun you can play with just one hand
・Addictive, family-friendly gameplay for players of all ages

Warning: once you start, you will not want to stop. Higher, faster, stronger, push your limits! Whether you are a gamer looking for a quick shot of excitement, a cat lover who adores charming art, or a family searching for something fun to play together, Cat & Friends: Jumping Adventure offers an irresistible, one-of-a-kind jumping experience.

Story
Their owner went to heaven first… One day, without warning, the Cat Friends were left alone in an empty house. The food bowl was still there, the favorite toys were still there, and the blanket still held their owner’s warmth and scent, but their owner was nowhere to be found. Every day, the cats sat by the window and gazed up at the sky. Then one night, a faint voice drifted down through the starlight.

“I miss you… I just want to hold you one more time…”

Their owner missed them too. No matter what obstacles stand in their way, no matter how high they have to climb, even to the very ends of heaven, they will keep jumping until they find their beloved owner. Tripping, sliding, falling, the cats never give up. If it means seeing their owner again, they will get back up over and over.

“Wait for us, dear owner. Your little cats are coming to find you, meow!”

Will the Cat Friends be reunited with their owner in heaven? Their heartfelt, high-flying journey to reach the one they love begins now.
